testcase.name: test_f_new_categories_persist

failure.message:
AssertionError: Category coerced! expected=approval_drawing got=drawing assert 'drawing' == 'approval_drawing'
- approval_drawing + drawing

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration8.py:74: in test_f_new_categories_persist assert body["category"] == cat, f"Category coerced! expected={cat} got={body['category']}" E AssertionError: Category coerced! expected=approval_drawing got=drawing E assert 'drawing' == 'approval_drawing' E E - approval_drawing E + drawing

testcase.name: test_b_stage_gates

failure.message: AssertionError: approval_drawing missing - cats=['drawing'] assert 'approval_drawing' in ['drawing']

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration8.py:108: in test_b_stage_gates assert "approval_drawing" in cats, f"approval_drawing missing - cats={cats}" E AssertionError: approval_drawing missing - cats=['drawing'] E assert 'approval_drawing' in ['drawing']

testcase.name: test_c_materials_crud

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration8.py:124: in test_c_materials_crud assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
